textByHash.332f8e6b43bf974943b5d2666393059e5c8c00fd: I've only been up Death Plateau once to complain about the noise but those pesky trolls started throwing rocks at me!
textByHash.6b99c0bbc1eb56a026dc0da6b6426ee1c83febd3: You told me you'd get rid of the trolls!
textByHash.7ab10a1fd2705e4c0f746ecfd5f350cb13b35830: I just want to be left in peace!
textByHash.8c71780257ec50568f73cd782e561906447181f1: Have you got rid of those pesky trolls yet?
textByHash.a6c7d433916e6a760fd39e02b4d586ac1c90009b: I dunno but he must live around here somewhere!
textByHash.a741ac9f0322ae3960f31ee653096b639d2bfbc8: Before the trolls came there used to be a nettlesome Sherpa that took humans exploring or something equally stupid. Perhaps he'd know another way.
textByHash.aeb21dfe92092db029dee0f7e9304f261007c565: I shall have peace again at last!
textByHash.bf169364a81a3a1bce80deb4913bf4da3adfb14d: Why won't people leave me alone?!
textByHash.d099c9128851f9bdcf4ea706067fb95a61ad72cd: It used to be just humans trampling past my cave and making a racket. Now there's those blasted trolls too! Not only do they stink and argue with each other loudly but they are always fighting the humans.
textByHash.f0ff14c6d84644c5dd0f4b2baa7077e1b9834315: If those pesky humans don't start trampling all over Death Plateau again that is!
textByHash.f536da8cbcb070b97a9b1a32b04c98d1eebfe7a3: Why would I want to go up there? I just want to be left in peace!
textByHash.ffdc1d406c3f0d262103bb7e06d296d577e6cb04: I don't know but it can't be far as he used to be around all the time!
